name: From Beyond
short_description: From Beyond is a game about a man being transported into a different world after being stabbed. Will he find happiness and hope in a world filled with despair? Will he piece the puzzle pieces together and uncover the mystery of his newfound colorblindness? That's up to you... Or is it?
detailed_description:
What is this game about?

Ivran gets stabbed and transported into a world that is very different from his own. From the moment he manages to get up on his feet after recovering, he's immediately dragged into situations he's not accustomed to. Will he find happiness in this world or continue his path of indifferent nihilism? Will he uncover the reasons behind his newfound color-blindness? Only the persistent ones will be able to find answers to these questions.

This visual novel is a prequel to the Izora Sequence book series.

What to expect?

  • Various endings

  • Hand-drawn art

  • Insight into a brutal fantasy world

  • A story that sheds more light on the characters from Izora Sequence series
